passages.passage_text: Directions (Q. 24-30): Study the following information carefully and then answer the questions given below. A spying organisation receives messages from its spies via a computerised fax machine which generates different rearrangements of words to maintain secrecy of the transmitted messages. The following is an illustration of input and steps of rearrangement. Input: Anis goes to the bar after dinner everyday Step I: After Anis goes to the bar dinner everyday Step II: Anis after goes to the bar dinner everyday Step III: everyday Anis after goes to the bar dinner

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: For the following input, some steps are given below (not necessarily in the same order). One of them may be wrong or there may be more than one step. You have to find correct then choose the right answer. Input: 82, 74, 53, 22, 40, 64 1) 98, 12, 10, 56, 111, 88 2) 100, 16, 16, 64, 121, 100 3) 64, 40, 53, 22, 74, 82 4) 88, 12, 10, 56, 111, 88

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: In how many steps will the following input be fully arranged? Input: 15, 38, 24, 26, 42, 68, 53, 85

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: If following is the step IV of the input then what will be step I of the input? Step IV: 17, 22, 41, 34, 48, 73, 62, 58 1) 17, 22, 73, 48, 34, 41, 62, 58 2) 17, 62, 73, 48, 34, 41, 22, 58 3) 58, 62, 73, 48, 34, 41, 22, 17 4) Can't be determined 5) None of these

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Which number will not appear for the given input in any step before VII, during arrangement process by the machine? Input: 73, 84, 62, 52, 29, 63, 14, 40 1) 14 2) 29 3) 84 4) 52 5) Any one

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: If 631, 29, 520, 474, 48, 312, 502, 36, 68 is the third step of an input, what will be the following for the last step which is step V?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Which of the following is the last step for the following input? Input: 47, 432, 127, 52, 309, 87, 28
